prompt: A natural-looking street fashion portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="young Japanese man"} standing on an urban pedestrian overpass in daylight, framed vertically from mid-thigh to head. He is leaning casually against a worn green metal railing with one hand in his coat pocket, body slightly angled, giving a relaxed but stylish candid pose rather than standing straight. He has medium-length wavy tousled hair in {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"}, soft volume around the ears and forehead, and a slim build. Dress him in layered neutral-toned winter fashion: an oversized wool coat in {argument name="coat color" default="taupe beige"}, a chunky knit crewneck sweater in {argument name="sweater color" default="cream"}, and a long striped button-up shirt peeking out at the collar and hem. The mood is calm, refined, and contemporary, like a Japanese men's fashion editorial. Use soft natural sunlight with realistic skin tones, subtle shadows, muted colors, and shallow depth of field. In the background, show out-of-focus mid- and high-rise city buildings, bare winter trees, and a pale bright sky, creating a realistic Tokyo-like urban atmosphere. Photorealistic, understated color grading, detailed fabric texture, editorial composition, no dramatic effects, no text overlays, no extra people.
translatedPrompt: 一张自然风格的街头时尚肖像，主体为一位 {argument name="subject" default="年轻日本男性"}，在日光下站在城市人行天桥上，构图为从大腿中部到头部的竖版肖像。他随意地倚靠在磨损的绿色金属栏杆上，一只手插在外套口袋里，身体微微倾斜，呈现出一种放松且时髦的抓拍姿态，而非笔直站立。他留着中等长度的微卷凌乱发型，发色为 {argument name="hair color" default="深棕色"}，耳部和额头处有自然的蓬松感，身材修长。为他穿上叠穿风格的中性色调冬季时装：一件 {argument name="coat color" default="灰褐色"} 的超大款羊毛大衣，内搭一件 {argument name="sweater color" default="米白色"} 的粗棒针圆领毛衣，领口和下摆露出长款条纹衬衫。整体氛围冷静、精致且充满现代感，如同日本男士时尚杂志的内页。使用柔和的自然光，呈现真实的肤色、细腻的阴影、柔和的色彩以及浅景深效果。背景中展示失焦的中高层城市建筑、冬季的枯树以及明亮的浅色天空，营造出真实的东京式都市氛围。写实风格，低调的色彩分级，细腻的织物纹理，杂志编辑级构图，无戏剧性特效，无文字叠加，无其他路人。

breakdown.creativeCore: 天桥上的都市男装肖像：此提示词可生成一张写实风格的竖版时尚肖像，展现了一位身着中性叠穿服饰的年轻男士，背景为柔焦处理的日本城市街景，适用于编辑类或生活方式类图片。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, editorial]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field]。

Text requirements:
禁止额外文字。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
